chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 1949 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 30.03.2026 None present for the Petitioner. Dr. Liaquat Ali Abro, Law Officer, Law Department, Govt. of Sindh. ----------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
